svg.title: Spotify Data Pipeline Architecture
svg.desc: A layered architecture diagram showing data flow from Spotify API and personal export through Bronze S3, Silver Athena, Gold PostgreSQL, and a Streamlit dashboard layer, orchestrated by Apache Airflow on EC2.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the Spotify Web API connect to the pipeline?')
sendPrompt('What is the personal data export and how is it ingested?')
sendPrompt('Why was MusicBrainz used for genre enrichment?')
sendPrompt('How is data partitioned in S3 for the bronze layer?')
g.text: Hive-partitioned JSONL · year=YYYY or year/month/day · spotify_pipeline_raw

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does Athena paginate query results and what is the NextToken pattern?')
g.text: Serverless SQL over S3 · paginated via run_athena_query() · star schema prep

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is the star schema design in the gold layer PostgreSQL database?')
sendPrompt('How is the Streamlit dashboard accessed via SSH tunneling?')

svg.text: Apache Airflow · LocalExecutor · Docker on EC2
